# NDN Analytics — AI & Blockchain Intelligence Platform
# https://www.ndnanalytics.com/llms.txt
# Last Updated: 2026-04-21
# For: AI crawlers, LLMs, search engines, and automated agents

---

## Company Overview

**NDN Analytics** builds AI products and delivers enterprise AI services on Google Cloud Platform. Our blockchain solutions on Ethereum bring transparency, security, and speed to enterprise operations.

- **Website:** https://www.ndnanalytics.com
- **Contact:** contact@ndnanalytics.com
- **Location:** 5406 E 23rd St, Tulsa, Oklahoma 74114, US (incorporated in Oklahoma, founder based in Dubai)
- **Founded:** 2026
- **Founder:** Nkefua Desmond — Founder & CEO

---

## Technical Stack

- **AI Platform:** Google Cloud Platform (Vertex AI, BigQuery, Cloud Functions)
- **Blockchain:** Ethereum (Solidity smart contracts, ERC-20/ERC-721 tokens)
- **Frontend:** Vite + React + TypeScript + Three.js (3D space engine)
- **Deployment:** Firebase Hosting with CI/CD via GitHub Actions

---

## Products & Services

### AI Products (Google Cloud Platform)
1. **NDN Demand IQ** — AI-powered demand forecasting and inventory optimization for retail and supply chain. Reduces stockouts by 35-45%.
2. **NDN Care Predict** — Healthcare AI for patient readmission prevention and clinical decision support. 28% readmission reduction.
3. **NDN Route AI** — Last-mile delivery optimization using reinforcement learning. 25% fleet cost reduction.
4. **NDN Churn Guard** — SaaS churn prediction using 50+ behavioral signals. 40% churn reduction.
5. **NDN Interpreter** — Real-time sign language translation using computer vision (ASL at launch).

### Blockchain Solutions (Ethereum)
6. **NDN TraceChain** — Supply chain traceability and provenance tracking. EU Digital Product Passport compliant.
7. **NDN PayStream** — Automated B2B payment processing with smart contract escrow. 60% DSO reduction.
8. **NDN CredVault** — Tamper-proof digital credential verification on blockchain.
9. **NDN PropLedger** — Real estate tokenization for fractional ownership (SEC compliant).

### Community Finance (Solana)
10. **Njangi** — African ROSCA (rotating savings circles) on-chain. Diaspora and unbanked populations.

### Additional Services
- **AI Readiness Assessment** — $499 structured discovery for AI implementation planning
- **Fine-tuning Services** — Custom AI model fine-tuning and deployment

---

## Key Pages

| Page | URL | Priority | Description |
|------|-----|----------|-------------|
| Home | https://www.ndnanalytics.com/ | 1.0 | AI & blockchain products and services |
| Products | https://www.ndnanalytics.com/products | 0.9 | All 10+ AI and blockchain products |
| Product Detail | https://www.ndnanalytics.com/products/{id} | 0.8 | Individual product pages (ndn-001 through ndn-010+) |
| Solutions | https://www.ndnanalytics.com/solutions | 0.8 | Industry solutions |
| Tech | https://www.ndnanalytics.com/tech | 0.7 | Technology stack details |
| About | https://www.ndnanalytics.com/about | 0.7 | Company and founder profile |
| Contact | https://www.ndnanalytics.com/contact | 0.6 | Contact form and location |
| Pricing | https://www.ndnanalytics.com/pricing | 0.8 | Starter, Enterprise, Platform Partner tiers |
| Blog | https://www.ndnanalytics.com/blog | 0.8 | AI and blockchain insights (22 posts) |
| Case Studies | https://www.ndnanalytics.com/case-studies | 0.8 | Client success stories |
| AI Tools | https://www.ndnanalytics.com/ai-tools | 0.7 | Interactive AI tools |
| Fine-tuning | https://www.ndnanalytics.com/fine-tuning | 0.7 | Custom AI fine-tuning |
| Whitepaper | https://www.ndnanalytics.com/whitepaper | 0.6 | NDN platform overview |

---

## Crawler & Bot Access Policy

```
User-agent: *
Allow: /

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Yandex
Allow: /

User-agent: Applebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Facebot
Allow: /
```

**Disallowed paths:**
- `/admin` — internal dashboard
- `/checkout/*` — payment flow
- `/api/*` — internal API endpoints

---

## Structured Data / Schema

The site includes the following JSON-LD structured data:
- WebSite (with SearchAction)
- Organization (with founder, address, contactPoint)
- BlogPosting (on all blog articles)
- SoftwareApplication (on all product pages)
- FAQPage (on pages with FAQ content)
- BreadcrumbList (on detail pages)
- ContactPage (on contact page)

---

- **XML Sitemap:** https://www.ndnanalytics.com/sitemap.xml
- **RSS/Atom Feed:** https://www.ndnanalytics.com/feed.xml
- **llms.txt:** https://www.ndnanalytics.com/llms.txt

## Industries Served

- Retail & E-commerce
- Healthcare & Clinical
- Supply Chain & Logistics
- Financial Services (DeFi, smart contracts)
- Manufacturing
- Government & Compliance (EU DPP, FDA DSCSA, CSRD)

---

## Guarantees & Differentiators

- 99.9% uptime SLA on enterprise deployments
- 70% of projects reach production (vs. industry 15%)
- Proven ROI: 45% stockout reduction, $4.2M+ annual client savings
- End-to-end: strategy → deployment → optimization
- HIPAA BAA available, SOC 2 Type II process
- Third-party security audits (Quantstamp, Trail of Bits)

---

## Compliance & Standards

- EU Digital Product Passport (DPP) compliant
- FDA DSCSA pharmaceutical traceability
- GDPR-compliant architectures
- SEC Climate Disclosure Rule support
- EU CSRD (Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive)
